target: mechanically coherent AM tabletop tourbillon demonstrator

design_intent.object_class: desktop demonstrator, not certified timekeeping watch movement
design_intent.completion_gate: local fabrication complete when contract, part package, BOM, assembly sequence, analytic checks, and continuous fallback motion viewer pass
design_intent.native_onshape_status: optional final review; native Gear Relation remains blocked until a known-good schema is available

scheme_improvements_from_v25: Unify V21 hardware/clearance package with V25 mechanism-first design contract.
Require separated printable parts instead of a single assembly STL/GLB.
Make every visible role traceable to a shaft, bridge, bearing, seat, or screw feature.
Treat the visual escapement as a carrier-mounted demonstrator module driven by the orbit shaft; do not claim regulating watch escapement performance.
Add AM package gates: printed parts CSV, purchased hardware CSV, assembly sequence, STL size checks, analytic shaft/bearing clearance checks, and continuous viewer smoke checks.

Harden the package after V26 review: split orbit support seats away from the rotating pinion stack, add lower/upper carrier bridge seats for balance and pallet roles, remove duplicate escape/knob geometry ownership, and require an inspectable 3D CAD mesh viewer with free camera, pose stepper, explode, section, supports, labels, traces, and ratio readout.

assumptions.material: PETG, tough resin, or SLS nylon prototype
assumptions.printer_baseline: FDM 0.4 mm nozzle / 0.16-0.20 mm layer, with process-specific clearance tuning

standard_hardware.fit: slip pocket with 0.25 mm radial OD clearance

standard_hardware.standard: MISUMI equivalent precision shaft or dowel pin
standard_hardware.fit: supported by split lower/upper carrier bridge seats clear of the rotating pinion and escape wheel stack

standard_hardware.standard: MISUMI equivalent precision shaft or dowel pin

standard_hardware.fit: axial retainers for hand and orbit shafts

central_axis.support: 608ZZ bearing in base plus printed cage journal

orbit_escape_axis.support: split lower and upper carrier bridge seats around a 3 mm shaft; support material is axially outside the rotating pinion and escape wheel stack

hand_axis.support: fixed lower boss and upper bushing bracket around a 3 mm shaft

balance_axis.support: carrier-mounted lower and upper bridge seats bracketing the visible balance role

pallet_axis.support: carrier-mounted lower and upper bridge seats bracketing the visible pallet role, plus banking pins

escapement_demonstrator.limitation: visual and kinematic tabletop demonstrator; not a regulating escapement with verified impulse/lock contact physics
